# Load-for index

<!-- generated:by=scripts/gen_load_for_index.py from=docs/spec/*.md front-matter `load_for:`; do not edit by hand. See docs/CONTRIBUTING-DOCS.md. -->

Reverse index of the `load_for:` front-matter tag across the spec
tree. Generated by `scripts/gen_load_for_index.py`.

For each task tag, lists every spec doc that declares it, with the
doc's declared `tokens:` and a per-tag total. The canonical source
is each doc's front-matter; this file restates by reference only.
AGENTS.md `## Context routing` selects subsets of these per-task
load-sets — see that table for per-task curated bundles.
